pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation module in Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: NoClassDefFoundError or compile error for javax.annotation classes which were removed from the JDK in Java 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' in newer JDKs; while not strictly a compile failure on all toolchains, it is the required migration pattern for Java 11+ compiler configuration.
